name: llm_synthesized_cJSON_to_json_rust_public_v1

op_parse_invalid_inputs.description: Parse handling of null, empty, and unterminated inputs from source parse_with_opts tests
op_parse_invalid_inputs.normalization: json::parse returns Err for empty or malformed input (source asserts NULL)

op_create_object_add_bool.description: Create object and add boolean values, then retrieve by key
op_create_object_add_bool.normalization: JsonValue::new_object creates object, JsonValue::insert adds key/value, Object::get retrieves value

op_create_object_add_number.description: Create object and add number, then retrieve by key
op_create_object_add_number.normalization: JsonValue::insert with f64 value, Object::get retrieves number

op_create_object_add_string.description: Create object and add string, then retrieve by key
op_create_object_add_string.normalization: JsonValue::insert with string, Object::get retrieves string

op_create_object_add_true_false.description: Create object and add true/false constants, then retrieve by key
op_create_object_add_true_false.normalization: JsonValue::insert with Boolean(true) and Boolean(false); Object::get retrieves them

op_create_object_add_array_and_object.description: Create object and add empty array and empty object, then retrieve by key
op_create_object_add_array_and_object.normalization: JsonValue::insert with new_array() and new_object(); Object::get retrieves them

op_array_add_and_detach.description: Create array, add items, detach first item, check length
op_array_add_and_detach.normalization: JsonValue::new_array creates array, push adds elements, array_remove removes and returns removed element, len returns size

op_delete_from_array.description: Parse a JSON object, add array with items, delete an item, verify output with dump
op_delete_from_array.normalization: Parse '{}', add 'rd' array, push two items, delete first, dump results must match source expected strings

op_get_string_value.description: Get string value from string and number values
op_get_string_value.normalization: as_str returns Some for string, None for number

op_get_number_value.description: Get number value from number and string values
op_get_number_value.normalization: as_f64 returns Some for number, None for string

op_typecheck.description: Type checking functions for all JSON value types
op_typecheck.normalization: Each is_* returns true only for matching type

op_replace_item_in_object.description: Add item to object then replace it preserving key
op_replace_item_in_object.normalization: Insert replaces existing value for same key; Object::get retrieves the new value

op_add_item_to_object_cs.description: Create object and add item via cJSON_AddItemToObjectCS (case-sensitive insert, mapped to Object::insert)
op_add_item_to_object_cs.normalization: Object::insert with case-sensitive key (Rust always case-sensitive)

op_delete_item_from_object.description: Delete item from object by key using cJSON_DeleteItemFromObject and case-sensitive variant
op_delete_item_from_object.normalization: Object::remove returns Option<JsonValue>, source discards return. Same behavior for case-sensitive (Rust is case-sensitive).

input.case: parse_with_opts with NULL (simulated via empty string) and incomplete JSON

expected.observable_behavior: json::parse returns Err for empty and unterminated input
json::parse of empty string returns Err
json::parse returns Err for trailing data

input.case: create object, add bool true and false

expected.observable_behavior: retrieved keys are boolean true and false
retrieved key is number with value 42

input.case: create object, add true and false

expected.observable_behavior: retrieved keys are boolean true and false

input.case: create object, add empty array and empty object

expected.observable_behavior: retrieved keys are array and object

input.case: create array, push number, detach first element

expected.observable_behavior: array length decreases and removed element is correct

input.case: parse '{}', add array 'rd', push items, delete first, dump

expected.observable_behavior: dump matches expected strings after each mutation

input.case: call as_str on string and number values

expected.observable_behavior: as_str returns Some for string, None for number

input.case: call as_f64 on number and string values

expected.observable_behavior: as_f64 returns Some for number, None for string

input.case: create values of each type and test is_* methods

expected.observable_behavior: each is_* returns true only for matching type

input.case: add item then replace, check key preserved

expected.observable_behavior: after replacement, key is still 'child' and value is new number

input.case: create object, add number via cJSON_AddItemToObjectCS (case-sensitive insert)

expected.observable_behavior: retrieved key is number with value 42

input.case: create object, add key, delete it (both case-sensitive and insensitive variants)

expected.observable_behavior: after deletion, key retrieval returns None

_harness_api_audit.heuristic: Identifier-level Rust harness audit. This is not receiver-aware Rust name resolution; mentioned_but_not_declared is an audit signal, while declared_but_not_mentioned is treated as a stronger adapter consistency problem during LLM synthesis.
